findings.description: The source contains a Java code block that explicitly shows the equivalent ArrayList/HashMap construction for the data returned by getListMap. This illustrates how the rows in the Excel table map to the key-value pairs of each Map entry. The knowledge file states the return type as List<Map<String, String>> but omits this concrete equivalence example.

The class SqlResultSet is used in the code example for the loop-test section (as the return type of selectByPk and the argument to assertSqlResultSetEquals) but is not listed in the hints array for s2.
